title: byttneria melastomifolia var. affinis
intro: Byttneria melastomifolia var. affinis is a plant species that belongs to the family Malvaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Byttneria melastomifolia var. affinis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as wounds and infections. The plant is typically prepared as an infusion or decoction by steeping the leaves in hot water to make a herbal tea for medicinal purposes.
